name: Broccoli Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (10 oz each) frozen chopped broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Stir in the flour and cook for 1 minute.
3. Add the milk and continue cooking, stirring until thickened.
4. Add the cheeses and cook until the cheese melts and the mixture is smooth.
5. Cook and drain the broccoli according to package instructions.
6. Stir the cheese mixture into the broccoli.
7. Turn the mixture into a buttered 1/2-quart casserole dish.
8. Sprinkle with bread crumbs.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
